author: cms-L1TK
body:
#### PR description:

1) Add function to get cluster width in r-z plane (to compliment one that already exists for r-phi).
2) Simplify function to get cluster position.
3) Add option to function that gets cluster position to reduce granularity to match what the front-end electronics outputs (0.5*pitch in rphi plane and 1*pitch in rz plane). By default, this option is disabled, but must code calling this function should probably switch to enabling this option. -- This reduces discrepancies between DTC emulated stub positions and TT floating point stub positions.

#### PR validation:

No change in tracking performance with "granularity" option off, which is currently the default.
title: Improve TTCluster
